headline: Spain Bans 2 Crypto Firms Over Gambling Laws

article.title: Spanish authorities block Polymarket and Kalshi over gambling laws
article.summary: Spain joined a growing list of national authorities restricting or banning prediction market platforms amid concerns over unlicensed gambling activities.

headline: Bitcoin Plunges to $77K on Iran Deal Uncertainty

article.title: Bitcoin 'liquidation hunts' control BTC at $77K amid new Iran peace deal doubts
article.summary: Bitcoin failed to copy US stocks' upside after a spike to $78,000 became one of a series of liquidity grabs.

headline: SpaceX IPO Boosts Satellite Stocks 15% Overnight

article.title: Rocket, Satellite Stocks Surge as SpaceX IPO Fuels Euphoria
article.summary: Space and satellite-related stocks soared Tuesday as investor enthusiasm around the industry intensified after Elon Musk’s SpaceX filed for a public offering last week.

headline: Oklo Surges 15% on $10M US Fuel Deal

article.title: Altman-Backed Oklo Rises on US Nuclear Reactor Fuel Program
article.summary: Oklo Inc. shares jumped after the the Sam Altman-backed reactor technology company said it’s in talks to participate in a US Department of Energy program to supply nuclear fuel, an effort aimed at relieving potential bottlenecks that threaten to slow the deployment of fission power.

headline: BP Ousts Chair Amid Governance Crisis

article.summary: Hands-on approach was viewed as excessive by several colleagues at oil major

article.title: BP is deeply dysfunctional, but it could be worse
article.summary: Investors should be concerned by Manifold’s ousting, but better to fire too many executives than too few
